message:
test: expand Google Discovery auth validation and provisioning test
coverage, sync beads and lockfile

Substantially expand test suites for the fcp-google-discovery crate's
auth and provisioning modules to cover edge cases, error paths, and
serde roundtrips that were previously untested.

crates/fcp-google-discovery/src/auth.rs (+862 lines of tests):
- Token/access_token conflict handling: tests for token field alias,
  conflicting token vs access_token values, and matching values
- validate_token_url: HTTPS acceptance, localhost/127.0.0.1/[::1] HTTP
  loopback acceptance for tests, non-local HTTP rejection, invalid URL
  rejection
- normalize_scope_list: deduplication, sorting, whitespace trimming
- Additional auth selection, credential validation, and error path
  coverage

crates/fcp-google-discovery/src/provisioning.rs (+777 lines of tests):
- GoogleProvisioningAuthFlow: default value, serde roundtrip for
  AuthorizationCodePkce and DeviceCode variants, Clone/Eq, Debug format
- GoogleProvisioningError: display formatting for UnknownSurface,
  UnknownEscalationTrigger, and Catalog transparent variant
- GoogleProvisioningSurfaceProfile: escalation trigger enumeration,
  bundle loading, profile validation

Metadata:
- Cargo.lock: lockfile update reflecting tracing-subscriber addition
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker statuses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
